description: Programmatic triage of all 204 Phase D books for evaluation
methodology: 8 automated checks: genre-structure consistency, title-genre signals, author extraction cross-check, death date model agreement, author confidence, Shamela category vs genre, SPEC §6.3 attribution compliance, trust math verification

errors.book: النكت على شرح النووي على صحيح مسلم
errors.finding: genre=hashiyah but ML=false with 0 layers. Internal contradiction.

errors.book: السراج المنير في ترتيب أحاديث صحيح الجامع الصغير
errors.finding: Death date disagreement: Opus=911 (السيوطي), CA=1420 (الألباني). Probable author misidentification.

warnings.finding: ML disagreement: Opus=true, CA=false. 6/8 are tahqiq-note bias (override working). 2 need verification.
Edition group genre inconsistency: إعلام الموقعين (other vs matn), الإبانة (risalah vs matn)
Low author confidence (<0.70): وقفة هادئة (0.30), الإسلام وحقوق (0.55), الورقة النحوية (0.55), حقوق الإنسان (0.55)
canonical_model='unknown' in 190/204 consensus.json files. Recording bug — does not affect output correctness.
33% trust flagging rate. Root cause: no muhaqiq + unknown/contemporary author. Formula working correctly for these inputs.
Opus wins canonically ~90% of the time (inferred from 121 books with field disagreements). Concentration risk if Opus has systematic biases.

verified_correct: Trust math: all 204 books — trust_score matches weighted factor sum
Trust tier threshold: all 204 books — tier matches 0.65 cutoff
SPEC §6.3 attribution: 47 disagreements all resolved conservatively, 0 violations
Regression: 0 negative regressions from Phase C. 3 ML improvements (BUG-03 override)
Phase C VERIFIED genre stability: 0 genre changes in formerly-verified books
